name: Mocha Chocolate Chip Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine graham cracker crumbs, 1 cup of semi-sweet chocolate chips, and butter. Mix well.
2. Pat the mixture firmly into a 9-inch springform pan, covering the bottom and 2 1/2 inches up the sides. Set aside.
3. In a small saucepan, combine milk and instant coffee. Sprinkle gelatin on top. Set aside for 1 minute.
4. Cook over low heat, stirring constantly until gelatin and coffee dissolve. Set aside.
5. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until creamy.
6. Beat in sweetened condensed milk and the gelatin mixture from step 3.
7. Fold in whipped cream and the remaining 1 cup of semi-sweet chocolate chips.
8. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
9. Chill until firm (about 2 hours).
10. Run a knife around the edge of the cake to separate it from the pan, then remove the rim.
